segment.title: Ishan Kishan appointed interim captain of Sunrisers Hyderabad for TATA IPL 2026
segment.script: A major change is coming to the TATA IPL 2026 season! Sunrisers Hyderabad has officially named Ishan Kishan as their interim captain. This bold appointment marks a new chapter for the franchise. Will Kishan’s leadership be the game-changer the team needs?
